message:
fix(output_compression): verify reconstruction before template encoding

compress() now checks that each line can be faithfully reconstructed from
the extracted template before storing it as a TemplateInstance. Lines
that would be lossy (due to aggressive similarity grouping at high
thresholds) fall back to Literal storage, guaranteeing lossless
compress/decompress roundtrips for all similarity_threshold values.

Removes #[ignore] from the regression_lossy_high_threshold test and
flips the assertion to assert_eq, confirming the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
